<!DOCTYPE qgis PUBLIC 'http://mrcc.com/qgis.dtd' 'SYSTEM'>
<qgis version="3.40.5-Bratislava">
  <identifier>USGSEsriWCMC_GlobalIslandsv2_SmallIslands</identifier>
  <parentidentifier></parentidentifier>
  <language>ENG</language>
  <type>dataset</type>
  <title>USGSEsriWCMC_GlobalIslandsv2_SmallIslands</title>
  <abstract></abstract>
  <keywords vocabulary="gmd:topicCategory">
    <keyword></keyword>
  </keywords>
  <links/>
  <dates/>
  <fees></fees>
  <constraints type="Access">None. Please see 'Distribution Info' for details.</constraints>
  <rights>None. Users are advised to read the data set's metadata thoroughly to understand appropriate use and data limitations.</rights>
  <encoding></encoding>
  <crs>
    <spatialrefsys nativeFormat="Wkt">
      <wkt>PROJCRS["World_Mollweide",BASEGEOGCRS["WGS 84",DATUM["World Geodetic System 1984",ELLIPSOID["WGS 84",6378137,298.257223563,LENGTHUNIT["metre",1]]],PRIMEM["Greenwich",0,ANGLEUNIT["Degree",0.0174532925199433]]],CONVERSION["World_Mollweide",METHOD["Mollweide"],PARAMETER["Longitude of natural origin",0,ANGLEUNIT["Degree",0.0174532925199433],ID["EPSG",8802]],PARAMETER["False easting",0,LENGTHUNIT["metre",1],ID["EPSG",8806]],PARAMETER["False northing",0,LENGTHUNIT["metre",1],ID["EPSG",8807]]],CS[Cartesian,2],AXIS["(E)",east,ORDER[1],LENGTHUNIT["metre",1]],AXIS["(N)",north,ORDER[2],LENGTHUNIT["metre",1]],USAGE[SCOPE["Not known."],AREA["World."],BBOX[-90,-180,90,180]],ID["ESRI",54009]]</wkt>
      <proj4>+proj=moll +lon_0=0 +x_0=0 +y_0=0 +datum=WGS84 +units=m +no_defs</proj4>
      <srsid>27878</srsid>
      <srid>54009</srid>
      <authid>ESRI:54009</authid>
      <description>World_Mollweide</description>
      <projectionacronym>moll</projectionacronym>
      <ellipsoidacronym>EPSG:7030</ellipsoidacronym>
      <geographicflag>false</geographicflag>
    </spatialrefsys>
  </crs>
  <extent>
    <spatial miny="-60.76982399999999984" maxx="179.99998899999999935" maxy="83.22846400000000244" maxz="0" dimensions="2" crs="ESRI:54009" minx="-179.99998899999999935" minz="0"/>
  </extent>
</qgis>
